components.name: Esher Devar
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Fersteel Alloy
components.description:
Ferros that has been forged into a stronger metal.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Fish Scales
components.description:
A material used in tailoring clothes and cultivating synthetics.

Source: Cut from all Plains of Eidolon Fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).

components.name: Grokdrul
components.description:
A noxious mix of polysaccharides and long-chain polymers, Grokdrul is a standard chemical used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some two-handed Melee weapons (i.e. Hammer Zaw (Rabvee), Heavy Blade Zaw (Dokrahm), Kuva Shildeg) sticking to your hand no matter what you’re doing.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Added Lifted status to Rabvee Heavy Slam radial attack when used with a two handed Zaw.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to Chat link Dokrahm, Rabvee or Sephfan Zaws.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Zaw Strikes Sepfahn, Rabvee, Dokram and handles Korb and Shtung now have a chance to be used in Hok's Daily Specials.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.4
patchlogs.changes: Rabvee strike one handed stance polarity changed to Zenurik to match existing Stances.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rabvee playing the wrong hit effect sounds.
